name: Spacebot
description: AI agent for teams, communities, and multi-user environments
compose:
name: slashnode-spacebot
services:
  server:
    image: ghcr.io/spacedriveapp/spacebot:v0.5.0
    container_name: spacebot
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      TZ: ${TZ:-UTC}
    volumes:
      - server_data:/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:19898:19898
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data:
    name: slashnode-spacebot_server_data
